subject: Worker 2: Build one section of a cinematic Next.js landing page. Working in: D:/
description: Build one section of a cinematic Next.js landing page. Working in: D:/vietfi-advisor. DO NOT push to git. Write your section to src/app/demo-awwwards/[section-name].tsx. Design: dark cinematic nature/tech, serif headings (Playfair Display), sans body (Inter), glassmorphism, neon green accents. Colors: #020202 bg, #0a1a0a forest, #00ff6a neon green. Export your component as default. Use Framer Motion (useScroll/useTransform for scroll animations, stagger variants, useInView). Lenis assumed for smooth scroll.
